description.S: A BBC journalist reported on March 16, citing CENTCOM imagery, that the combined force struck a military depot site in Yazd, Yazd Province, on March 11. CENTCOM Commander Admiral Brad Cooper confirmed the depot was associated with 'IRGC missile command infrastructure' and used to build 'light and heavyweight torpedoes,' and stated that US strikes have shifted to targeting Iran's wider manufacturing apparatus and defense industrial base.
